title: PMS Elves Behaving Badly Elf Doll Dress Up Outfit Christmas Novelty Accessory Dinosaur Costume
features: 🎄 Prehistoric Holiday Fun: Transform your elf into a roaring dinosaur with spikes and a tail.
✨ Perfect for Christmas Scenes: Adds a classic and heartwarming touch to your holiday elf setups.
🎁 Unique Elf Accessory: A creative costume that brings festive charm to your Elves Behaving Badly doll.
🛠️ Easy to Use: Quick and simple to dress your elf, with a secure fit for standard elf dolls.
📏 Lightweight and Durable: Made from high-quality materials for long-lasting fun.
description: Travel back in time with the Dinosaur Costume. This adorable green and yellow design with a spiky tail will delight kids as your elf roars into holiday mischief.
